ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
**Penmanship & Copywork: Grade 1**
• Copy the following using your best penmanship:
kill mix wink rub by
• Share your Copywork Journal with an adult.

**Reading Level 1**
• Have the student read aloud for one minute using the next (previously unread) section in Treadwell. Count the number of words read correctly during that minute.
For the Fall of 1st grade, typical fluency rate is somewhere between 0-10 words per minute (Rasinski & Padak, 2009).

**Penmanship & Copywork: Grade 1**
• Copy the following using your best penmanship:
Red hen found a wheat seed.
• Share your Copywork Journal with an adult.

**Reading Level 1**
• Have the student read aloud from the next (previously unread) section in Treadwell for one minute. Count the number of words read correctly during that minute.
For the Winter of 1st grade, typical fluency rate is somewhere between 10-50 words per minute (Rasinski & Padak, 2009).

**Penmanship & Copywork: Grade 1**
• Copy the following using your best penmanship:
Grasshopper green has a quaint little house.
• Share your Copywork Journal with an adult.

**Reading Level 1**
• Have the student read aloud from the next (previously unread) section in Treadwell for one minute. Count the number of words read correctly during that minute. 
For the Spring of 1st grade, typical fluency rate is somewhere between 30-90 words per minute (Rasinski & Padak, 2009).
